name_cn:
Caramel Calfskin with Canvas
Extraordinary lightweight texture, named for the exquisite Y logo inspired by the fashion house's archival designs.
Elegant and structured, the handle features a hollow-out design and comes with an adjustable detachable shoulder strap for various carrying options.
Gives a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Unisex, suitable as a briefcase or travel tote, with extra-large capacity.
Model: 800224
Dimensions: 23×29.5×3-8.5cm
Handle Height: 7cm
Shoulder Strap Length: 48cm
